overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, dystopian Night City street at night. The scene features acid rain, neon-lit buildings, street vendors, and transitions from a commercial corner to an elevated industrial walkway overlooking train tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with vendor stalls

events.description: passes by the street vendor cart on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past a street vendor working at their cart near the teal building

notable_agents.action: vendor working at a food cart on the sidewalk, handling equipment

entered.detail: two-story teal commercial building with large glass windows and neon signage at the intersection
food cart with cooking equipment and supplies on the sidewalk
tall skyscraper with illuminated 07 signage visible through the haze in the background
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in a row
yellow digital billboard displaying rotating advertisements
tall black traffic signal pole at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City street corner featuring a distinctive teal commercial building. The player walks along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing a street vendor working at their cart on the left. Palm trees and digital advertising kiosks line the street while the iconic Tower 07 looms in the hazy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street with moving traffic

events.description: futuristic sports car with glowing red taillights drives past on the wet road
second vehicle with headlights on approaches and passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street edge as futuristic vehicles pass by on the rain-slicked asphalt

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car driving past with glowing red taillights reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: low-rise industrial structures with dark facades and neon accent lighting across the street
large electrical pylons with multiple high-tension cables stretching across the scene
tall street lights casting warm orange glow on the rainy street

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the commercial corner, the scene opens into a wider multi-lane street. The player walks along the asphalt as futuristic vehicles with glowing lights pass by on the wet road. Industrial buildings with neon accents line the opposite side while large power transmission towers dominate the hazy skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking industrial district

events.description: transitions from street level to elevated walkway with metal safety fence overlooking tracks below
pedestrian with blonde hair walks past the camera on the left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pathway overlooking the industrial tracks and city below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blonde hair and dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the fence line

entered.detail: tall black metal railing with horizontal bars providing safety on the elevated walkway
train tracks or highway visible through the fence below with vehicles and industrial equipment
smooth concrete wall of the elevated structure with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated pedestrian walkway with a metal safety fence on the left overlooking industrial tracks below. The player continues walking along the concrete path as the city stretches out in the hazy distance below. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction, and the warm artificial lighting continues to illuminate the rainy cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit commercial street corner into an elevated industrial vista overlooking the rainy city. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beside a teal commercial building, passing a street vendor and digital kiosks while the hazy silhouette of Tower 07 looms in the background. As the camera moves away from the corner, the scene opens into a wider multi-lane street where futuristic vehicles with glowing lights glide across the asphalt beneath towering power transmission lines. The path then shifts upward onto an elevated pedestrian walkway, moving along a metal safety fence that overlooks industrial tracks below. Finally, the camera continues forward past a passing pedestrian, revealing the sprawling, hazy expanse of the cyberpunk cityscape under warm artificial lighting.
